hero_subtitle: Your private lakeside retreat. Drift into stillness, reawaken to the sound of water and pine.
about_title: A Retreat Where Nature Does the Work
about_body1: Nestled among ancient pines in Pennsylvania's Pocono Mountains, Pocono Lake Haven sits directly on a pristine, private lake. Wake to misty mornings on the water. Spend afternoons kayaking, fishing, or reading on the wraparound deck as herons glide past.
about_body2: As evening falls, gather around the stone fireplace with family and friends, or unwind in the private sauna, soak under the stars in the hot tub, or challenge each other in the game room. This is a place where time slows, connections deepen, and memories are made to last a lifetime.

highlights.title: Private Lake Access
highlights.text: Step off the deck onto your own private dock. Swim, fish, kayak, or simply watch the sun paint the water gold at dusk. The lake is all yours.

highlights.title: Stone Fireplace
highlights.text: A grand, floor-to-ceiling stone fireplace anchors the living room, filling the space with warmth and amber glow on cool mountain nights.

highlights.title: Multi Level Deck
highlights.text: A sweeping deck offers panoramic views of the lake and forest — the perfect setting for morning coffee, sunset cocktails, or star-filled evenings.

highlights.title: Kayaks & Paddleboards
highlights.text: Complimentary kayaks and paddleboards are ready for your adventure. Explore every quiet cove and mirror-still corner of the lake.

highlights.title: Chef's Kitchen
highlights.text: A fully equipped, open-concept kitchen with high-end appliances and a large island — ready for everything from big family breakfasts to candlelit dinners.

highlights.title: Stargazing Dock
highlights.text: Far from city lights, the Poconos offer some of the darkest skies in the Northeast. Lie back and watch the Milky Way arc overhead in full splendor.

booking_body: Check availability and reserve your stay at Pocono Lake Haven. Dates fill up fast — secure your retreat before they're gone.

gallery.alt: Enjoy the Lakeview from the firepit
